ayush_coverage.source_quote: 15. Alternative Treatment / AYUSH We will pay Medical Expenses up to the Sum Insured on your Hospitalization in Hospital or AYUSH Hospital or AYUSH Day Care Centre for any of the following Alternative Treatments prescribed by Medical Practitioner.

maternity_coverage.source_quote: Sterility and Infertility l Maternity l War and war-like situations l Injury or disease caused by or contributed to by nuclear weapons/materials l Treatment taken outside India l Circumcision

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: 14. Organ Donor Expenses We will pay Medical Expenses up to the Sum Insured towards organ donor's Hospitalization for harvesting of the donated organ where an Insured Person is the recipient, subject to conditions mentioned in Policy wordings.

restoration_benefit.source_quote: 18. Sum Insured Refill We will refill 100% Basic Sum Insured on complete or partial utilization of your existing Policy Sum Insured in a Policy Year, including Cumulative Bonus or Enhanced Cumulative Bonus.

domiciliary_treatment.source_quote: 11. Domiciliary Hospitalization We will pay the Medical Expenses incurred on Domiciliary Hospitalisation, up to the Sum Insured as specified in the Policy Schedule.

worldwide_emergency_cover.source_quote: 17. Domestic Emergency Assistance Services (including Air Ambulance) We will provide Emergency medical assistance as below when you are traveling within India 150 kilometers or more away from your residential address mentioned in the Policy Schedule for domestic services.

preventive_health_checkup.source_quote: 1. Preventive Health Check-Up: You will be eligible for a preventive health check-up every year st from 1 renewal year.
